para_trans: Government Decision No: Narrow - 2026 / Q. No. 04 / Vashi - 4
To make available the notified employment opportunities at the level of skilled manpower in the state.
The issue of issuing standard operating procedures was under the consideration of the government.
The Government's Decisions:
Construction Workers (Home and Home Nursing Assistant Based Care Giver)
Internationally Notified Employment Opportunities in Two Sectors for Skilled Manpower in the State
Standard procedures (Marathi and English) to be available are attached.
2. The above standard procedures will be implemented through Mahima.
The decision is available on the Government of Maharashtra's www.maharashtra.gov.in website.
